subject: FW: hedge opportunity
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Jay Coleman [mailto:jayc@emcionline.com] 
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 7:30 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Peter Diamandis
Subject: hedge opportunity

jeffery--left a message for lesley today about scheduling a call for  
us this week so i can introduce the new opportunity peter briefly  
discussed with you.  if you like what you hear, i would look forward  
to making a full presentation which would require you signing an nda.

i have worked with peter on the x-prize and several of his other  
ventures for the past 12 years.  i think peter believes we have  
developed one of the most profitable and unique business models he  
has ever seen.

look forward to meeting you.  i can be reached at 212 420 9898 ext  
338 or on cell  917 913 0004.  thanks
body_html:
-----Original Message-----
From: Jay Coleman [mailto:jayc@emcionline.com]

Cc: Peter Diamandis
Subject: hedge opportunity

jeffery--left a message for lesley today about scheduling a call for
us this week so i can introduce the new opportunity peter briefly
discussed with you. if you like what you hear, i would look forward
to making a full presentation which would require you signing an nda.

i have worked with peter on the x-prize and several of his other
ventures for the past 12 years. i think peter believes we have
developed one of the most profitable and unique business models he

look forward to meeting you. i can be reached at 212 420 9898 ext
